allow:
Bash(# Test SEC EDGAR submissions API for Berkshire
curl -s "https://data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK0001067983.json" \\
  -H "User-Agent: AI-Trading-Assistant contact@example.com" | \\
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
types = d['filings']['recent']['form']
accs = d['filings']['recent']['accessionNumber']
dates = d['filings']['recent']['reportDate']
docs = d['filings']['recent']['primaryDocument']
for i,\(t,a,dt,doc\) in enumerate\(zip\(types,accs,dates,docs\)\):
    if '13F' in t:
        print\(f'idx={i} type={t} acc={a} date={dt} doc={doc}'\)
        break
" 2>&1)

Bash(# Test the filing index
ACC="0001193125-26-054580"
ACC_NO_DASHES="${ACC//-/}"
CIK="1067983"
curl -s "https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/${CIK}/${ACC_NO_DASHES}/index.json" \\
  -H "User-Agent: AI-Trading-Assistant contact@example.com" | \\
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
items = d['directory']['item']
for item in items:
    print\(item['name'], item.get\('type',''\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(# Check the raw index.json structure 
curl -s "https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1067983/000119312526054580/index.json" \\
  -H "User-Agent: AI-Trading-Assistant contact@example.com" | \\
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
items = d['directory']['item']
for item in items:
    print\(json.dumps\(item\)\)
" 2>&1)
